_README: Bank spellings that mean the same bank but differ by more than case or
punctuation, so the build cannot merge them safely on its own.
Key = a spelling seen in the data, value = the spelling to merge it into.
Matching ignores case and punctuation, so "K-Bank" and "kbank" are already
handled automatically and do not need an entry here.
Add an entry ONLY when you know the two are the same institution. Merging
two different banks silently changes every published figure for both.
Candidates seen in the current data, left unmerged pending confirmation:
sacombank / SACOM      ICBC / ICBCV      pbb ps / PBBVT
